hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); REPO="/Users/irrssue/Documents/minimal-hackernews"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cd "$REPO" && git add "$FILE" && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "auto: update $(basename $FILE)" && git push origin main); fi 2>/dev/null || true
